SEARCH
Module org.jgrapht.core
Package org.jgrapht.alg.isomorphism

Class VF2GraphMappingIterator<V,E>

java.lang.Object
org.jgrapht.alg.isomorphism.VF2GraphMappingIterator<V,E>
Type Parameters:
V - the type of the vertices
E - the type of the edges
All Implemented Interfaces:
Iterator<GraphMapping<V,E>>
public class VF2GraphMappingIterator<V,E> extends Object
This class is used to iterate over all existing (isomorphic) mappings between two graphs. It is used by the VF2GraphIsomorphismInspector.

  • Method Details

    • match

      protected IsomorphicGraphMapping<V,E> match()
      This function moves over all mappings between graph1 and graph2. It changes the state of the whole iterator.
      Returns:
      null or one matching between graph1 and graph2
